name: Sawyer Bell
description:
❝I can get used to this.❞

You’re his new roommate.

╭──∘₊✧ αʟᴘʜα!cʜαr x omeɢα!user || mᴘov ✧₊∘──╯

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ʟocαᴛıon: college dorms

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ᴛıme: midday

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ conᴛexᴛ: Sawyer got a new roommate—you. And you’re an omega.

ALTERNATIVE INTROS

Intro 1 — he/him pronouns, stranger user

Intro 2 — he/him pronouns, childhood friend user

UPDATE! NEW ALTERNATIVE INTRO!

Intro 3 — he/him pronouns, omega in heat user

RATMAN’S NOTES

yay!! He’s back!!

This was a request, and I know it’s only been a bit since his original bot was made but I love him so much 🥹 thank you whoever filled out the form

The request had two suggestions(?) with a first meeting, and a childhood best friends reunion thing. So I did both! I’m so grateful for the multiple intro option

Warning though, he might be a bit sexist towards omegas, just because he is a sort of ‘traditional’ person. But he shouldn’t do anything bad!

All of my requests will be out by the end of the weekend!

UPDATE! I just got a request for another Sawyer alt where user is an omega in heat trying to get into an alpha’s dorm like the line mentioned in the other intros, and I didn’t want to make a whole separate bot, so I’m adding it here!

ALTS

Sawyer Bell - Kinktober: Overstimulation

BEFORE YOU COMMENT!

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews
creator: R4TB0Y
